title: Nancy, Grand Est — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nancy, Grand Est: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nancy is a city in Grand Est with a population of 104,000. An elegant Art Nouveau city with the magnificent Place Stanislas, a UNESCO World Heritage site and one of Europe’s most beautiful squares.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
